Notice Of Motion And Motion To File Amendment To Complaint Substituting Defendants True Name For Fictitious Name
Off Calendar Sep-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF GOLD STAR TAXI'S Motion To File Amendment To Complaint Substituting Defendants' True Name For Fictitious Name is granted. Plaintiff has shown good cause for the motion and granting the motion is supported by California's strong policy of liberally allowing amendments to pleadings. Prevailing party to submit a [proposed] written order tracking the Court's ruling, verbatim.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)

TDN SWEEP
